title: Spiti Valley Explorer
subtitle: Cold Desert · Buddhist Monasteries · Snow Peaks

itinerary.title: Delhi to Shimla
itinerary.desc: Overnight bus. Arrive Shimla by morning.

itinerary.title: Shimla to Nako
itinerary.desc: Drive through Kinnaur Valley via Sangla.

itinerary.title: Nako to Kaza
itinerary.desc: Cross Spiti Valley. Visit Dhankar Monastery.

itinerary.title: Kaza Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Key Monastery, Kibber, Hikkim Post Office.

itinerary.title: Chandratal Lake
itinerary.desc: Trek to the crescent moon lake. Camp overnight.

itinerary.title: Kaza to Manali
itinerary.desc: Cross Rohtang Pass. Arrive Manali.

itinerary.title: Manali to Delhi
itinerary.desc: Overnight bus back to Delhi.

description: Experience the raw beauty of Spiti — a cold desert mountain valley. Buddhist monasteries on rocky cliffs, crystal-clear skies, and warm homestays.

title: Kasol & Kheerganga Trek
subtitle: Parvati Valley · Hot Springs · Pine Forest

itinerary.title: Delhi to Kasol
itinerary.desc: Volvo overnight. Arrive Kasol. Explore village.

itinerary.title: Kheerganga Trek
itinerary.desc: 13km trek through pine forest. Hot springs at top.

itinerary.title: Trek down + Return
itinerary.desc: Morning descent. Bus back to Delhi.

description: Kasol's hippie vibe meets Kheerganga's natural hot springs. Trek through dense pine forests, camp under stars.

title: Bhutan Backpacking
subtitle: Tiger's Nest · Punakha Dzong · Thimphu

itinerary.title: Delhi to Paro
itinerary.desc: Fly to Paro. Transfer to Thimphu.

itinerary.title: Thimphu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Buddha Dordenma, National Museum, local market.

itinerary.title: Punakha
itinerary.desc: Drive to Punakha. Visit Punakha Dzong.

itinerary.title: Tiger's Nest
itinerary.desc: Trek to Paro Taktsang (2–3 hrs). Most iconic spot.

itinerary.title: Dochula Pass
itinerary.desc: 108 stupas with Himalayan panorama.

itinerary.title: Paro local
itinerary.desc: Local sightseeing. Traditional hot stone bath.

itinerary.title: Return Delhi
itinerary.desc: Flight back to Delhi.

description: The Last Shangri-La. Tiger's Nest, Dzongs, mountains — Bhutan is unlike anywhere. Small groups, full experience.

title: Thailand Islands & Bangkok
subtitle: Phi Phi Islands · Phuket · Bangkok Nightlife

itinerary.title: Delhi to Bangkok
itinerary.desc: Night flight. Check in hotel.

itinerary.title: Bangkok Day
itinerary.desc: Grand Palace, Wat Pho, Khao San Road.

itinerary.title: Bangkok to Phuket
itinerary.desc: Domestic flight. Beach hotel check-in.

itinerary.title: Phi Phi Islands
itinerary.desc: Full-day speedboat island hopping.

itinerary.title: Phuket Beach
itinerary.desc: Patong Beach, Old Town, Big Buddha.

itinerary.title: Cooking Class + Markets
itinerary.desc: Thai cooking class, night market.

itinerary.title: Return Delhi
itinerary.desc: Flight back to Delhi.

description: Thailand's best — Bangkok's chaos, Phi Phi's turquoise waters, Phuket's sunsets. One unforgettable group trip.

title: Rajasthan Royal Circuit
subtitle: Jaipur · Jodhpur · Jaisalmer Desert

itinerary.title: Delhi to Jaipur
itinerary.desc: Overnight bus. Arrive Jaipur morning.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur
itinerary.desc: Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer + Desert
itinerary.desc: Sam sand dunes. Sunset camel safari. Desert camp.

itinerary.title: Return Delhi
itinerary.desc: Morning drive, reach Delhi by evening.

description: Royal Rajasthan — from pink Jaipur to blue Jodhpur to golden Jaisalmer. Camel safaris, desert camping, royal forts.

title: Kedarkantha Winter Trek
subtitle: Snow Trails · Summit 3800m · Uttarakhand

itinerary.title: Delhi to Sankri
itinerary.desc: Overnight drive to Sankri base camp.

itinerary.title: Sankri to Juda ka Talab
itinerary.desc: 5km trek through dense forest.

itinerary.title: Juda ka Talab to Kedarkantha base
itinerary.desc: Trek with views of Swargarohini peak.

itinerary.title: Summit Day
itinerary.desc: 3am start. Summit at 3800m by sunrise. Epic panorama.

itinerary.title: Descent to Sankri
itinerary.desc: Trek down through snow-covered meadows.

itinerary.title: Return Delhi
itinerary.desc: Drive back. Reach Delhi by night.

description: Kedarkantha is India's best winter summit trek. Snow-capped peaks, frozen lakes, and breathtaking 360° views.

title: Goa Beach Weekend
subtitle: North Goa · Beaches · Nightlife · Seafood

itinerary.title: Fly to Goa
itinerary.desc: Morning flight. Check-in beach resort. Baga Beach evening.

itinerary.title: Dudhsagar + Beaches
itinerary.desc: Dudhsagar falls trip. Vagator sunset. Candlelight beach dinner.

itinerary.title: Anjuna + Return
itinerary.desc: Anjuna flea market. Afternoon flight back Delhi.

description: The perfect Goa escape — beaches, sunsets, seafood, and nightlife with your group. Fly in, party out.

title: Manali Snow Trip
subtitle: Solang Valley · Rohtang · Snow Activities

itinerary.title: Delhi to Manali
itinerary.desc: Overnight Volvo. Arrive Manali morning.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley
itinerary.desc: Snow activities — zorbing, skiing, snowman. Lunch at valley.

itinerary.title: Old Manali + Rohtang
itinerary.desc: Rohtang pass. Old Manali cafes. Hadimba Devi temple.

itinerary.title: Return Delhi
itinerary.desc: Bus back. Arrive Delhi midnight.

description: Manali's snowfields in winter — Solang Valley, Rohtang Pass, snow activities. Group fun at 2050m altitude.

title: Bali Group Adventure
subtitle: Ubud · Seminyak · Volcano Trek · Rice Terraces

itinerary.title: Delhi to Bali
itinerary.desc: Night flight. Arrive Ngurah Rai airport.

itinerary.title: Ubud Cultural
itinerary.desc: Monkey Forest, rice terraces, local market.

itinerary.title: Mt. Batur Trek
itinerary.desc: 2am trek. Summit at sunrise. Magical views.

itinerary.title: Seminyak
itinerary.desc: Beach day. Sunset at Tanah Lot temple.

itinerary.title: Uluwatu
itinerary.desc: Kecak fire dance, cliff temple, hidden beaches.

itinerary.title: Free Day
itinerary.desc: Shopping, spa, surfing at Kuta.

itinerary.title: Return Delhi
itinerary.desc: Flight back.

description: Bali is magic — volcano treks, rice terraces, ancient temples, and beaches. The group trip of a lifetime.

title: Rishikesh Adventure Weekend
subtitle: River Rafting · Bungee Jump · Camping · Yoga

itinerary.title: Delhi to Rishikesh
itinerary.desc: Morning bus. Arrive noon. Beach camp setup. Ganga Aarti evening.

itinerary.title: Rafting + Activities
itinerary.desc: 16km rafting (Grade 3–4). Optional bungee jump. Bonfire night.

itinerary.title: Yoga + Return
itinerary.desc: Morning yoga. Laxman Jhula. Return Delhi.

description: Grade 3–4 rafting, bungee jumping, bonfire camping on Ganga banks. Rishikesh adventure with your crew.

title: Hampta Pass Trek
subtitle: Kullu to Spiti · High Altitude Pass · 4270m

itinerary.title: Delhi to Manali
itinerary.desc: Overnight Volvo. Arrive Manali.

itinerary.title: Manali to Jobra
itinerary.desc: Drive to Jobra. Camp in meadows.

itinerary.title: Jobra to Shea Goru
itinerary.desc: Trek 10km. Glacier views.

itinerary.title: Cross Hampta Pass
itinerary.desc: Summit day at 4270m. Cross to Spiti side.

itinerary.title: Chandratal Lake
itinerary.desc: Drive to Chandratal. Camp by the lake.

itinerary.title: Return Delhi
itinerary.desc: Drive Kaza–Manali–Delhi.

description: Hampta Pass — the most dramatic trail in Himachal. Cross from lush Kullu valleys to arid Lahaul-Spiti in 4 days.

title: Nepal Pokhara & EBC View
subtitle: Kathmandu · Pokhara · Poon Hill · Everest Sunrise

itinerary.title: Delhi to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Fly. Transfer to hotel. Thamel exploration.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Pashupatinath, Boudhanath, Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Scenic bus/flight. Check-in lakeside hotel.

itinerary.title: Nayapul to Ghorepani
itinerary.desc: Start Poon Hill trek. Pine forests.

itinerary.title: Poon Hill Sunrise
itinerary.desc: 4am hike to Poon Hill. Epic Annapurna sunrise.

itinerary.title: Trek down to Nayapul
itinerary.desc: Descend. Drive Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Lake Day
itinerary.desc: Phewa Lake boat. Paragliding optional.

itinerary.title: Return Delhi
itinerary.desc: Fly Kathmandu–Delhi.

description: Nepal on a budget — Kathmandu's temples, Pokhara's lake, Poon Hill's Himalayan sunrise. One epic group adventure.
